litigation.mdlName: In re: Aqueous Film-Forming Foams Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, District of South Carolina (Charleston)

phase: Personal-injury bellwether reset; water-system settlements paying out
phaseDetail: Case Management Order No. 35 (August 15, 2025) vacated the October 2025 kidney-cancer bellwether trial and opened a claim-verification window; tens of thousands of new claims were filed during it. No new personal-injury trial date had been set as of June 2026. The first personal-injury bellwether track is kidney cancer.
defendants: Arkema, Chemguard, Buckeye Fire Equipment, National Foam, Dynax and others

settlements.label: 3M — public water systems
settlements.status: final approved, paying out — water systems only
settlements.detail: $10.5 billion to $12.5 billion paid over 13 years to public water systems for PFAS contamination, per the official settlement FAQ. Final approval entered by Judge Gergel (fairness hearing February 2, 2024). Compensates water utilities, not individuals.

settlements.label: DuPont / Chemours / Corteva — public water systems
settlements.status: final approved, paying out — water systems only
settlements.detail: $1.185 billion settlement resolving claims of roughly 14,000 public water systems. Final approval entered following the December 14, 2023 fairness hearing.

settlements.label: Tyco Fire Products / Chemguard — public water systems
settlements.status: final approved, paying out — water systems only
settlements.detail: $750 million settlement; final approval order entered November 2024 (ECF 6406).

settlements.label: BASF — public water systems
settlements.status: final approved, paying out — water systems only
settlements.detail: $316.5 million total ($312.5M settlement amount + $4M notice/administration); agreement signed May 20, 2024, final approval entered November 22, 2024.
settlements.source: BASF preliminary approval motion (official settlement site)

settlements.label: Personal-injury claims
settlements.detail: No settlement program exists for individual injury claims (kidney cancer, testicular cancer, thyroid disease, ulcerative colitis). The reset kidney-cancer bellwether and any rulings around it are expected to drive personal-injury settlement posture.

keyDates.label: MDL-2873 established
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal AFFF cases before Judge Richard M. Gergel in the District of South Carolina.

keyDates.label: CMO 35 vacates October 2025 bellwether
keyDates.detail: The court vacated the first kidney-cancer personal-injury trial setting and opened a claim verification window.

keyDates.label: 15,240 pending cases
keyDates.detail: MDL remains the third-largest active products MDL (JPML, June 1, 2026).
